creator: bedreddinsahbaz@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

I removed the xf86-video-amdgpu package from the system. I updated the xf86-video-ati package (it was already installed on the system). I added the line "kld_list=/boot/mudules/radeonkms.ko" in /etc/rc.conf. Now the Xorg window manager works but the keyboard, screen and mouse freezes (black screen has mouse cursor and cursor whole system hangs). I still haven't been able to solve the problem.

Kind regards.
